quote: "My name is Ricardo, i was born in Mexico but currently living in Texas. I am 33 years old, I like to spend time with my kids, and my hobby is xat and play lotería, bingo, cards dominos, chat with my friends on xat. Happily taken by Oriana."
bio: Escribe tu bio aquí. Puedes poner lo que quieras — unas líneas sobre ti, tus intereses, o lo que sientas compartir.

songs.title: Have You Ever Seen The Rain
